steps.title: Identify the grammatical structure
steps.content: On the left of the blank is a dependent clause introduced by “Because”; on the right is an independent clause.

steps.title: Apply the introductory-clause comma rule
steps.content:
The rule is: an introductory dependent clause must be followed by a comma before the independent clause.

B correctly adds the comma after “content”. C omits the required comma, creating a fused sentence, while A and D add an unnecessary “and”.

This matches choice B — B is correct.
